mapper.select:
SELECT o.id AS id, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.status AS status, o.customer_name AS customerName, o.customer_id AS customerId, o.phone AS phone, o.created_at AS createdAt, o.contacts AS contacts, o.mark AS mark, o.delivery_date AS deliveryDate, o.order_type AS orderType, o.delivery_address AS deliveryAddress, o.order_at AS orderAt FROM orders o WHERE 1=1
AND o.status = #{request.status}
AND (o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{request.keyword},'%') or o.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{request.keyword},'%') or o.phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{request.keyword},'%'))
AND o.created_at BETWEEN #{request.startTime} AND #{request.endTime}
AND o.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{request.customerName},'%')
AND o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{request.orderNo},'%')
order by o.created_at DESC
